content: Intrinsic curiosity signals from ICM/RND curiosity-driven reinforcement learning can be repurposed as active selection metrics for 2024–2025 SOTA long-episodic agent memory, where the agent only stores encountered transitions that trigger above-threshold prediction error (the same signal that drives exploration), pruning low-information trivial memories automatically to preserve memory efficiency and retrieval speed. This creates a self-tuning memory system where exploration drive directly shapes memory capacity, rather than relying on separate external active pruning rules.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
